data.content:
Acceptance Criteria:
show and claim show the latest handoff_capsule and the latest note - both the json and stdout response types should behave this way.

if more/older notes and/or handoff_capsules exist, there should be a suggestion text to run -v/--verbose to see all of them - the json should show the suggestion as part of the properly formatted json (an "other" field is suggested here).

for both show and claim, -v/--verbose should be add/supported to show all the notes and handoff_capsules.
